summary: Iteration 29 - Bug Fix Verification for 3 User-Reported Bugs. ALL 3 BUG FIXES VERIFIED: (1) Avatar dropdown menu is scrollable on mobile with max-h-[calc(100vh-70px)] overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain classes. (2) Arrow position is at right-[18px] aligning with green dot indicator. (3) Admin procedures dashboard renders properly on mobile 390px width with hamburger menu button visible, sidebar hidden by default, sidebar auto-closes after tab click, and all tabs (dashboard, procedures, stats, documents, config) render content correctly.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - cosmetic hydration warning from React dev tools, does not affect functionality

bug_fix_1_dropdown_scrollable.details: Profile dropdown has classes: max-h-[calc(100vh-70px)] overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain

bug_fix_2_arrow_position.details: Arrow element has class right-[18px] positioning it to align with green online indicator

api_calls_independent.details: API calls for categories, countries, and stats are independent (not Promise.all) - each has separate .catch() handler

critical_code_review_comments: Header.js ProfileDropdown correctly implements scrollable dropdown with max-h-[calc(100vh-70px)] and overflow-y-auto
Arrow position right-[18px] aligns with green dot indicator which is at bottom-right of avatar
AdminProceduresDashboard.js correctly implements responsive sidebar with fixed positioning, translate-x transforms, and auto-close on mobile
API calls are correctly separated (lines 115-117) so one failing doesn't block others
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 bug fixes verified: (1) Avatar dropdown scrollable on mobile with max-h and overflow-y-auto, (2) Arrow aligned at right-[18px] with green dot, (3) Admin procedures dashboard responsive with hamburger toggle on mobile. All tabs work on both mobile 390px and desktop 1920px viewports. Minor cosmetic console warning about span in select/option from React dev tools.
